Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Im setting up a timeline with cumulative time offsets in seconds to represent the progression through different stages starting from the initial point and adding intervals for each subsequent phase

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now Im calculating the standard deviations for each transition step ranging from 3 hours to 5 days depending on the stage then computing pairwise standard deviations using root sum of squares to account for accumulated uncertainty across multiple steps

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Im working through the pairs systematically starting with all combinations involving the first stage and calculating both the mean time difference and the propagated standard deviation for each pair

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Calculating distance metrics for the OP pairs working through each combination with the Euclidean distance formula to get approximate values ranging from about 434200 to 445000

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Continuing through the remaining pairs calculating distances for QI connections with CA PT PK WS and DT then moving into the CA pair calculations Calculating distance pairs
